title: Tender American Chicken Skillet
description: A yeasty and juicy American dish featuring black pepper, perfect for a brunch mood, made with air-fry method and nut-free friendly ingredients.
instructions: Preheat the air fryer to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, mix together chicken breast, black pepper, salt, garlic powder, and onion powder.
Add yeast extract to the bowl and mix until the chicken is well coated.
Add chicken broth to the bowl and mix until the chicken is well coated.
Spray the air fryer basket with air fryer oil.
Add the chicken mixture to the air fryer basket.
Cook the chicken in the air fryer for 12-15 minutes, shaking the basket halfway through.
Remove the chicken from the air fryer and serve hot.
Ensure poultry is cooked to an internal temperature of 74°C / 165°F (juices run clear, no pink remaining) before serving.
